name: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, time tracking discrepancies cause payroll errors. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate payroll processing due to time tracking discrepancies.

locked_fields.primary_user: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate payroll processing due to time tracking discrepancies.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, time tracking discrepancies cause payroll errors. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of payroll data using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, time tracking discrepancies cause payroll errors. We automate payroll reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
